gt_sql: SELECT T1.FavoriteCount FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN comments AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId WHERE T2.CreationDate = '2014-04-23 20:29:39.0' AND T2.UserId = 3025
pred_sql:
SELECT p.FavoriteCount
FROM comments c
JOIN posts p ON c.PostId = p.Id
WHERE c.UserId = 3025
  AND c.CreationDate = '2014-04-23 20:29:39';
question: User No.3025 gave a comment at 20:29:39 on 2014/4/23 to a post, how many favorite counts did that post get?
